title: Gas report - Week 6
summary:
LNG
The LNG market has faced yet another challenging week, with a general downward trend observed across most routes and vessel types. The BLNG1 Gladstone-Tokyo route for 160k cbm TFDE vessels experienced the only rate increase, rising by $200 to settle at $5,400 per day. In contrast, 174k cbm 2-Stroke vessels saw a decline of $1,343, closing at $10,350 per day.

children.title: LPG
children.summary: With the Far East market emerging from the Lunar New Year, there was hope for a potential uptick in the LPG market. Unfortunately, this was not the case, as downward pressure on rates and TCE earnings were observed across all key routes.
